name: openrelik-ai-common

metadata.name: openrelik-ai-common
metadata.summary: Common utilities for OpenRelik AI functionality

documentation:
### Common utilities for OpenRelik AI functionality.

```python
# LLM providers are configured via environment variables
# export OLLAMA_SERVER_URL=http://localhost:11434
# export OLLAMA_DEFAULT_MODEL=gemma2:9b

from openrelik_ai_common.providers import manager

llm = manager.LLMManager().get_provider("ollama")()
response = llm.generate(prompt="Hello")
print(response)
```

##### Obligatory Fine Print
This is not an official Google product (experimental or otherwise), it is just code that happens to be owned by Google.

documentation:
Format a prompt from a template.

Args:

Returns:

classes.name: openrelik_ai_common.providers.manager.LLMManager

methods.name: openrelik_ai_common.providers.manager.LLMManager.get_providers
documentation:
Get all registered providers.

Yields:
    A tuple of (provider_name, provider_class)

methods.name: openrelik_ai_common.providers.manager.LLMManager.get_provider
documentation:
Get a provider by name.

Args:
    provider_name: The name of the provider.

Returns:
    The provider class.

methods.name: openrelik_ai_common.providers.manager.LLMManager.register_provider
documentation:
Register a provider.

Args:
    provider_class: The provider class to register.

Raises:
    ValueError: If the provider is already registered.

methods.name: openrelik_ai_common.providers.manager.LLMManager.clear_registration
documentation: Clear all registered providers.
The manager for LLM providers.

methods.name: openrelik_ai_common.providers.googleai.GoogleAI.count_tokens
documentation:
Count the number of tokens in a prompt using the Google AI service.

Args:

Returns:

documentation:

Args:

Returns:

classes.name: openrelik_ai_common.providers.interface.LLMProvider

methods.name: openrelik_ai_common.providers.interface.LLMProvider.__init__
documentation:
Initialize the LLM provider.

Args:
    model_name: The name of the model to use.
    system_instructions: The system instruction to use for the response.
    temperature: The temperature to use for the response.
    top_p_sampling: The top_p sampling to use for the response.
    top_k_sampling: The top_k sampling to use for the response.
    max_output_tokens: The maximum number of output tokens to generate.

Attributes:
    config: The configuration for the LLM provider.

Raises:
    Exception: If the LLM provider is not configured.

methods.name: openrelik_ai_common.providers.interface.LLMProvider.to_dict
documentation:
Convert the LLM provider to a dictionary.

Returns:
    A dictionary representation of the LLM provider.

methods.name: openrelik_ai_common.providers.interface.LLMProvider.generation_config
documentation:
Get the generation config for the LLM provider.

Returns:
    A dictionary representation of the generation config.

methods.name: openrelik_ai_common.providers.interface.LLMProvider.count_tokens
documentation:
Count the number of tokens in a prompt.

Args:
    prompt: The prompt to count the tokens for.

Returns:
    The number of tokens in the prompt.

methods.name: openrelik_ai_common.providers.interface.LLMProvider.generate
documentation:
Generate a response from the LLM provider.

Args:
    prompt: The prompt to generate a response for.

Returns:
    The generated response.

methods.name: openrelik_ai_common.providers.interface.LLMProvider.chat
documentation:
Chat using the LLM provider.

Args:
    prompt: The user prompt to chat with.

Returns:
    The chat response.
Base class for LLM providers.
